violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.94 (foreground color: #738196, background color: #feffff, font size: 11.0pt (14.72px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 2.56 (foreground color: #94a3b8, background color: #ffffff, font size: 9.8pt (13.12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
